seoTitle: Quaama vs Quambone — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Quaama and Quambone. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Quaama and Quambone.
heading: Quaama vs Quambone — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Quaama, New South Wales and Quambone, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Quaama and Quambone have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Quaama or Quambone safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Quaama has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Quambone scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Quaama scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Quambone scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Quaama or Quambone?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Quaama has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
